full_text:
Fei Guan (Binbo) 費觀 (賓伯)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Fei Guan (費觀), styledBinbo (賓伯), was born in Jiangxia. Relative of Liu Zhang, he recommended Li Yan and later surrendered to Liu Bei. Fei Guan was affiliated with Liu Zhang and the Shu Kingdom.

BiographyHistoric (Confirmed)
Relative by his mother’s side and by marriage to Liu Zhang, he was sent with Li Yan to protect Mianzhu but led his troops to join Liu Bei instead. He was later made Grand Administrator of Ba commandery.
